action_content:
Q1 = df['fineagg'].quantile(0.25)
Q3 = df['fineagg'].quantile(0.75)
IQR = Q3 - Q1
med = df['fineagg'].median()

df.loc[df['fineagg'] > Q3 + 1.5 * IQR, 'fineagg'] = med

Q1_s = df['superplastic'].quantile(0.25)
Q3_s = df['superplastic'].quantile(0.75)
IQR_s = Q3_s - Q1_s
med_s = df['superplastic'].median()

df.loc[df['superplastic'] > Q3_s + 1.5 * IQR_s, 'superplastic'] = med_s
